description: Connects your domain to Keychain's blog publishing infrastructure. Adds the required SSL validation, CNAME, and CAA records so your blog goes live securely on your own domain.
variableDescription: blogHost: subdomain part of your blog URL (e.g. 'blog' for blog.example.com). blogTarget: Keychain's blog server hostname. sslHost: SSL certificate validation record name (provided by Keychain). sslTarget: SSL certificate validation record target (provided by Keychain).

variables.name: blogHost
variables.description: Subdomain for your blog (e.g. 'blog' for blog.yourdomain.com)

variables.name: blogTarget
variables.description: Keychain blog server hostname your subdomain should point to

variables.name: sslHost
variables.description: SSL certificate validation record hostname (generated by Keychain per domain)

variables.name: sslTarget
variables.description: SSL certificate validation record target (generated by Keychain per domain)
